name: Huperzine A
summary: Huperzine A is best framed around acetylcholinesterase inhibition and memory-support research, with conservative cognitive framing and safety screening for cholinergic sensitivity, seizure history, bradycardia, and cholinergic or anticholinergic medication conflicts.
description: Huperzine A is best framed around acetylcholinesterase inhibition and memory-support research, with conservative cognitive framing and safety screening for cholinergic sensitivity, seizure history, bradycardia, and cholinergic or anticholinergic medication conflicts.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.note: gap identification only; not used to populate factual fields

contraindications: Bradycardia or other cardiac conduction disorders (cholinergic slowing of heart rate)
seizure disorders or epilepsy without clinician guidance
peptic ulcer disease (increased gastric acid secretion)
concurrent use with other acetylcholinesterase inhibitors such as donepezil or galantamine (risk of cholinergic crisis with excess salivation sweating and bradycardia)
not studied in pregnancy or breastfeeding
